- 修复已选字幕在不同媒体 URI 之间无法稳定恢复的问题，已保存字幕和外部字幕记忆更可靠
- 移除底部导航栏，把云端和设置入口收纳到本地首页右上角菜单，并删除云端页重复的设置按钮
- 删除外观设置里的“显示云端标签”开关，并同步清理相关设置入口

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Fix selected subtitle restoration across different media URIs so remembered and external subtitles restore more reliably
- Remove the bottom navigation bar, move the cloud and settings entries into the top-right menu on the local home page, and remove the duplicate settings button from the cloud page
- Remove the "Show cloud tab" toggle from appearance settings and clean up the related settings entry

</details>
